/usr/bin/c++  -fopenmp -O3 -DNDEBUG -O3 -march=native -Wall -Wextra CMakeFiles/heat3d.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heat3d.dir/src/solverCUDAStencil.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heat3d.dir/src/solverCUDAMatrix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heat3d.dir/src/outputWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heat3d.dir/src/linearAlgebraGPU.cu.o CMakeFiles/heat3d.dir/src/grid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heat3d.dir/src/boundaryConditions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heat3d.dir/src/solverCPU.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heat3d.dir/src/linearAlgebraCPU.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heat3d.dir/src/kernel.cu.o CMakeFiles/heat3d.dir/src/voxelReader.cpp.o -o heat3d   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
